q: Do you type on a desktop or laptop keyboard every day?
examiner_note: Giám khảo muốn nghe về thói quen sử dụng công nghệ hàng ngày của bạn. Bạn có thể nói về mục đích (học tập, làm việc, giải trí) và loại thiết bị bạn ưu tiên. Hãy nhắc đến các khái niệm như 'ergonomics' (công thái học) hoặc 'tactile feedback' (phản hồi xúc giác) để thể hiện sự am hiểu và nâng điểm từ vựng. Đừng quên sử dụng các trạng từ chỉ tần suất như 'religiously', 'on a daily basis'.

band7.text: Yes, I type on my laptop keyboard every single day for my studies and work. It's become a habit for me, and I feel much more comfortable typing than writing by hand now. I use it to take notes, write emails, and chat with my friends.
band7.note: Trả lời tự nhiên, trôi chảy, sử dụng tốt các từ chỉ mục đích và tần suất.

band8.text: Indeed, I’m glued to my laptop keyboard on a daily basis. Since I’m a student, almost all of my assignments and research involve a significant amount of typing. I actually prefer the portability of a laptop, though I must admit that typing for long periods can be somewhat taxing on my wrists.
band8.note: Sử dụng các cụm từ tự nhiên như 'glued to', 'on a daily basis', 'portability', 'taxing on my wrists'.

band9.text: Without fail, I utilize my laptop's mechanical-feel keyboard for several hours every day. Given my current academic workload, it’s my primary interface for both composition and communication. While I appreciate the convenience of the built-in keyboard, I occasionally connect an external ergonomic keyboard to optimize my typing posture and mitigate the risk of repetitive strain. It’s an essential tool that I simply couldn't function without in this digital age.
band9.note: Từ vựng học thuật và chuyên môn rất tốt (utilize, interface, composition, ergonomic, optimize, posture, mitigate, repetitive strain). Cách diễn đạt chuyên nghiệp.

v.example: I check my emails on a daily basis.
Many teenagers are glued to their phones all day.
The portability of the iPad is its biggest selling point.
Long hours of screen time can be taxing on your eyes.
He goes for a run every morning without fail.

v.meaning: sử dụng (một cách có hiệu quả)
v.example: We should utilize all available resources to finish the project.
My academic workload has increased significantly this semester.

v.meaning: giao diện chính/phương thức tương tác chính
v.example: The touch screen is the primary interface for this device.
Typing is essential for the composition of my essays.

v.meaning: bàn phím tích hợp sẵn (trên laptop)
v.example: I find the built-in keyboard on my laptop quite comfortable.
I prefer using an external keyboard when working at my desk.

v.meaning: công thái học (thiết kế tối ưu cho con người)
v.example: The office was redesigned with a focus on ergonomics.
We need to optimize our website for mobile users.
Good posture is vital when sitting at a computer all day.
Regular breaks can mitigate the effects of eye strain.

v.meaning: chấn thương do vận động lặp đi lặp lại
v.example: Typing for too long can lead to repetitive strain in your wrists.
In the digital age, typing is a basic survival skill.
Gamers often prefer mechanical keyboards for better feedback.
Membrane keyboards are usually quieter than mechanical ones.
I like keys that provide a strong tactile feedback.
You can customize your keyboard with different colored keycaps.
A backlit keyboard is very useful when working in the dark.
I use a wireless mouse to keep my desk tidy.
The mouse and keyboard are essential computer peripherals.
Desktops are usually more powerful than laptops.
Microsoft Word is a standard productivity tool.
A keyboard is the most common input device.
Using a wrist rest can prevent pain during long typing sessions.
Laptops usually have a shorter key travel than desktops.
Different switches require different amounts of actuation force.
Learning keyboard shortcuts can save you a lot of time.
Touch typing is key to improving your typing efficiency.
A laptop is more versatile for people who travel often.
Regular maintenance of your keyboard prevents sticking keys.
It's important to keep your computer equipment dust-free.
Some people find clicky keyboards annoying in an office.
I chose silent switches for my office keyboard.
I’ve invested a lot of money into my home workstation.
Remote work has become more common after the pandemic.
Computers allow for seamless multitasking between apps.

v.meaning: thời gian sử dụng màn hình
v.example: We should all try to reduce our daily screen time.
Blue light filters can help protect your eyes at night.
I save all my typed documents on cloud storage.

v.meaning: một cách sùng đạo/cực kỳ đều đặn
v.example: I practice my typing skills religiously every morning.
A fast typing speed is essential for many modern jobs.
Typing for eight hours straight can be very strenuous.

v.meaning: một cách mượt mà/không tì vết
v.example: The keyboard connects seamlessly with my computer via Bluetooth.
Today's generation is very tech-savvy from a young age.
Planned obsolescence is a big problem in the tech industry.
My company provides us with state-of-the-art laptops.
